'''Tanner Helton''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForce]] urban guerrilla and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. [[Ebenn Q3 Baobab/Legends|Ebenn Q3 Baobab]] once provided Tanner with funds to smuggle medical supplies past [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] blockades and into the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], though Baobab oddly claimed that the funds were for deceased [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Finis Valorum/Legends|Valorum]] to assist the defunct [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. This was likely as a result of the dementia he was suffering at the time.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:TannerHelton.jpg|250px|thumb|Possible depictions of Tanner Helton]]
Benton was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']], a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]]. The game was shut down on [[December 15]], [[2011]]. Due to the nature of many older [[:w:c:swg:Quest|quests]] in ''Star Wars Galaxies'', the [[Species/Legends|species]], gender, and appearance of Tanner Helton changed each time a player performed this quest. Therefore, it is impossible to verify the [[canon]]ical species of Helton. However, the quest dialogue given by Baobab indicated that Tanner Helton was a [[Gender/Legends|male]]. Although not mentioned in the quest dialogue, examining Helton consistently identified him as an Alliance SpecForce urban guerrilla.
